What We Offer

Comprehensive Tax & Financial Services

From simple tax returns to immigration consulting and business formation, our team of credentialed professionals covers every aspect of your needs.

Tax Filing

Accurate federal and state income tax preparation for individuals, families, and small businesses. We maximize your refund while keeping you fully compliant.

  • Individual & joint returns
  • Self-employed & freelancer returns
  • Multi-state filing
  • Prior-year amendments
Learn more

USA VISA

Expert guidance through U.S. immigration processes — from visa applications and green cards to citizenship and ITIN registration for non-residents.

  • Visa applications (H-1B, L-1, O-1)
  • Green card & residency filing
  • Citizenship & naturalization
  • ITIN for non-residents
Learn more

Bookkeeping

Accurate, timely financial recordkeeping that gives you a clear picture of your business health and keeps you ready for tax season year-round.

  • Monthly reconciliation
  • Financial statements
  • Accounts payable/receivable
  • Payroll processing
Learn more

Startup Company Registration

Full business formation and compliance services — from choosing the right entity to filing with state and federal agencies so you launch with confidence.

  • LLC & corporation formation
  • EIN / Tax ID application
  • Articles of incorporation
  • Annual compliance filings
Learn more
View All Services
Why Golden Dollar

The Difference Is InOur Commitment

Since 2009, we've built our reputation on trust, accuracy, and results. When you choose Golden Dollar, you get a partner who is genuinely invested in your financial success.

$50M+
Total tax savings delivered to our clients — and counting.
2,500+
Clients Served
15+
Years Experience
99%
Satisfaction Rate

Licensed & Credentialed

Our team consists of CPAs, Enrolled Agents, and tax attorneys licensed to practice in all 50 states.

Transparent Pricing

Flat-fee pricing with no surprise billing. You know exactly what you pay before we start.

Year-Round Support

Tax questions don't only arise in April. We're available 365 days for all your financial needs.

Secure Document Portal

Safely upload and manage all your tax documents through our encrypted client portal.

Proven Track Record

Over $50 million in tax savings delivered across 2,500+ client accounts since 2009.

IRS Representation Rights

As enrolled agents, we have unlimited rights to represent you before the IRS at any level.

Simple Process

How It Works

Getting started is easy. Our streamlined process means you spend less time on paperwork and more time doing what you love.

1

Create Your Account

Register in minutes and receive your unique Customer ID. This ID organizes all your documents securely in the cloud.

2

Upload Your Documents

Use our secure portal to upload tax forms, receipts, W-2s, 1099s, and any other relevant files directly to your private folder.

3

We Handle the Rest

Your dedicated consultant reviews your documents, prepares your returns, and keeps you updated every step of the way.

Create Free Account

Trusted & Compliant

Secure Dropbox Storage

256-bit encrypted

Professional standards

Client Stories

What Our Clients Say

Don't just take our word for it — hear from the thousands of clients who trust Golden Dollar with their most important financial decisions.

SJ
Sarah Johnson
Small Business Owner · Austin, TX

Golden Dollar saved me over $14,000 on my business taxes last year. They found deductions I never knew existed and walked me through everything clearly. I won't trust anyone else with my finances.

MC
Michael Chen
Tech Entrepreneur · San Francisco, CA

When the IRS sent me an audit notice, I panicked. Golden Dollar's team took over completely, handled all the correspondence, and got the audit closed with zero additional liability. Truly life-saving.

AW
Amanda Williams
Freelance Designer · Chicago, IL

As a freelancer, tax season was always a nightmare. Now with their client portal, I upload documents year-round and they handle everything. My tax bill dropped significantly too!

RD
Robert Davis
Real Estate Investor · Miami, FL

Managing taxes across multiple investment properties was overwhelming. Golden Dollar built a custom strategy that maximized my depreciation and reduced my effective tax rate dramatically.

4.9
Based on 840+ verified reviews
